announcements.title: MedInnTech Minor Degree Program
announcements.content: Minor Degree in MedInnTech commences Monday, 6th July 2026. 22 Credits, 11 Courses, 5 Terms.

announcements.content: Exam August 2026 Notification with Application form available in departments.

announcements.title: ESA June - July 2026 Backlog Room Allotment
announcements.content: Backlog Room Allotment Session-1 published for all undergraduate classes.
